security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost data: blob: https: http:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Marq is an instant Markdown reader for Windows: it lives in your tray, opens .md files the moment you click them, renders them beautifully typeset, and exports print-quality PDFs.
